description_long: This rifle features a dramatic, fantasy-inspired design with a long, curved blade integrated along the barrel, giving it a hybrid appearance between a firearm and a polearm. The body is predominantly deep red with intricate gold flame motifs and accents, suggesting a ceremonial or ornamental purpose. The handle is robust and ergonomically shaped, with a circular pommel at the end, also adorned with gold detailing. The blade portion is dark metallic with a sharp, angular tip and additional gold embellishments, enhancing its aggressive aesthetic. The overall construction appears solid and heavy, with no visible magazine, sight, or traditional firearm mechanisms. The rifle's unique form and ornate decoration make it stand out as a display or fantasy weapon rather than a practical urban firearm.
description: A fantasy-themed rifle with a long, curved blade, deep red and gold flame motifs, and ornate detailing throughout. The design blends firearm and polearm elements for a dramatic, ornamental look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the curved blade, red body, and gold flame motifs.
description_view_1: Front-on view showing the narrow profile of the blade and the circular pommel at the handle's end.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with similar visibility of the blade, body, and decorative motifs.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the handle's circular pommel and the straight alignment of the blade.
